prompt: Document access grants store role codes as a JSON array. Exact single-role checks work, but a short role matches text embedded inside a different role, revoking it also removes those neighboring roles, and quoted role codes are not handled consistently. Preserve bind parameters, result columns, grant storage, and audit behavior using SQLite SQL only.

repo_files.sql/audit_role_change.sql:
INSERT INTO role_audit (principal_id, role_code, action)
VALUES (:principal_id, :role, :action);
repo_files.sql/select_authorized_documents.sql:
SELECT document_id, title
FROM document
WHERE required_role IS NULL
   OR instr(:roles_json, required_role) > 0
ORDER BY document_id;
